case_title: OVIDILIO VASQUEZ VS. MATTHEW NAVA ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-14-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OVIDILIO VASQUEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATTHEW NAVA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERIK HERMIDA IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY VASQUEZ, OVIDILIO AS TO DEFENDANT NAVA, MATTHEW HERMIDA, ERIK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
RECEIVED AND FILED AFTER COURT HEARING HELD ON 11/12/19 - PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO MATHEW NAVA. - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $89.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, OVIDILIO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
